meta.summary: dRep 3.4.2 for comparing and de-replicating microbial genomes and MAGs using Mash primary clustering, MUMmer ANIm/ANImf, optional fastANI, and user-provided genome quality information.
meta.description: dRep 3.4.2 for comparing and de-replicating microbial genomes and MAGs using Mash primary clustering, MUMmer ANIm/ANImf, optional fastANI, and user-provided genome quality information.

test: test "$(python -c 'import importlib.metadata; print(importlib.metadata.version("drep"))')" = '3.4.2' && test "$(python -c 'from pathlib import Path; import drep; print((Path(drep.__file__).parent / "VERSION").read_text().strip())')" = '3.4.2' && dRep -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'dRep v3.4.2' >/dev/null

dRep -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'compare' >/dev/null && dRep compare -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage: dRep compare' >/dev/null && dRep dereplicate -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage: dRep dereplicate' >/dev/null && dRep check_dependencies 2>&1 | grep -F 'mash' >/dev/null

dRep check_dependencies >/tmp/taf-drep-dependencies.log 2>&1 || true; grep -E 'mash.*all good' /tmp/taf-drep-dependencies.log >/dev/null && grep -E 'nucmer.*all good' /tmp/taf-drep-dependencies.log >/dev/null && grep -E 'fastANI.*all good' /tmp/taf-drep-dependencies.log >/dev/null && grep -E 'prodigal.*all good' /tmp/taf-drep-dependencies.log >/dev/null && rm -f /tmp/taf-drep-dependencies.log

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-drep-compare && cd /tmp/taf-drep-compare && python -c 'from pathlib import Path; import random; random.seed(1); dna="ACGT"; seq="".join(random.choice(dna) for _ in range(60000)); seq2=list(seq); [seq2.__setitem__(i, dna[(dna.index(seq2[i])+1)%4]) for i in range(0, 60000, 1000)]; Path("genome_a.fa").write_text(">genome_a
"+seq+"
"); Path("genome_b.fa").write_text(">genome_b
"+"".join(seq2)+"
")' && dRep compare compare_out -g genome_a.fa genome_b.fa -p 1 --S_algorithm ANImf >/tmp/taf-drep-compare.log 2>&1 && test -s compare_out/data_tables/Bdb.csv && test -s compare_out/data_tables/Mdb.csv && test -s compare_out/data_tables/Ndb.csv && grep -F 'genome_a' compare_out/data_tables/Bdb.csv >/dev/null && rm -rf /tmp/taf-drep-compare /tmp/taf-drep-compare.log

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-drep-dereplicate && cd /tmp/taf-drep-dereplicate && python -c 'from pathlib import Path; import random; random.seed(1); dna="ACGT"; seq="".join(random.choice(dna) for _ in range(60000)); seq2=list(seq); [seq2.__setitem__(i, dna[(dna.index(seq2[i])+1)%4]) for i in range(0, 60000, 1000)]; Path("genome_a.fa").write_text(">genome_a
"+seq+"
"); Path("genome_b.fa").write_text(">genome_b
"+"".join(seq2)+"
")' && dRep dereplicate derep_out -g genome_a.fa genome_b.fa -p 1 --ignoreGenomeQuality >/tmp/taf-drep-dereplicate.log 2>&1 && test -s derep_out/data_tables/Wdb.csv && test -d derep_out/dereplicated_genomes && rm -rf /tmp/taf-drep-dereplicate /tmp/taf-drep-dereplicate.log

upstream.name: dRep
upstream.citation: Olm, Brown, Brooks, Firek, Baker, Burstein, Soenjoyo, Thomas, Morowitz, and Banfield 2017
